name: profile-suggest writes a first-session marker after running so subsequent sessions do not re-prompt the operator
command: mkdir -p repo && printf '{"name":"x"}\n' > repo/package.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/profile-suggest/scan.sh" --root repo --state .claude-tdd-pro/profile-suggest-state.json 2>err.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/profile-suggest/scan.sh" --root repo --state .claude-tdd-pro/profile-suggest-state.json 2>out.txt && grep -q 'already_ran=true' out.txt && grep -q 'skipped' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
